title: Pan-Seared Fish with Jamaican Seasoning
description: A simple yet flavorful French-inspired dish featuring pan-seared fish fillets seasoned with a Caribbean twist.
instructions: 1. Heat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. Season the fish fillets with Jamaican seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
3. Brush the fish with olive oil.
4. Grill the fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches a safe internal temperature of 145°F.
5. Remove the fish from the grill and let it rest for 2-3 minutes.
6. Serve the fish hot, garnished with shattering (optional).
